creator: jin@pesto.lbl.gov
text:
ghostscript-2.6.2 installation script has a chmod 444 command
	on lib/ghostscript. This "chmod 444 command" causes none can access
	lib/ghostscript directory, all ghostscript command fail.

Fix: 

change command "CHMOD to 444" to "CHMOD to 555" in the installation
	script.
